Operations on pricing condition records (A_SlsPrcgConditionRecord)

item.name: Retrieve a list of pricing condition records

request.name: Retrieve a list of pricing condition records

description.content: Returns a collection of sales pricing condition records. Use OData query options to filter by condition type, material, customer, sales organization, validity dates, and other attributes.

info.name: SAP Sales and Distribution (SD) SAP Pricing Condition Record API

description.content:
Create, read, update, and delete condition records for pricing in sales. This OData service (API_SLSPRCGCONDITIONRECORD_SRV) manages sales pricing condition records including price lists, discounts, surcharges, and freight conditions used to determine prices in sales documents within SAP S/4HANA.

Contact Support:
 Name: SAP Support
